title: x-tra creamy welsh lamb bake
description: a rich, comforting welsh dish featuring lamb, kaffir lime leaf, and a touch of char-grilled yam. perfect for a cozy autumn evening.

ingredients.name: 1.5 lbs lamb shoulder, bone-in
ingredients.notes: ask your butcher to leave the bone intact for added flavor

ingredients.name: 2 medium yams
ingredients.notes: char-grilled yams add a sweet, caramelized flavor to the dish

ingredients.name: 1 large onion
ingredients.notes: caramelize the onion slowly to bring out its natural sweetness

ingredients.name: 3 cloves garlic
ingredients.notes: mince the garlic and sauté it with the onion for added depth

ingredients.name: 1 cup lamb or beef broth
ingredients.notes: use a rich, flavorful broth to enhance the dish's overall flavor

ingredients.name: 1 cup heavy cream
ingredients.notes: the heavy cream adds a luxurious, creamy texture to the dish

ingredients.name: 1 tsp dried thyme
ingredients.notes: thyme pairs perfectly with lamb and adds a savory, herbal flavor

ingredients.name: 1 tsp dried rosemary
ingredients.notes: rosemary complements thyme nicely and adds a piney flavor

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup chopped fresh kaffir lime leaf
ingredients.notes: kaffir lime leaf adds a unique, citrusy flavor to the dish

ingredients.name: 1 tsp salt
ingredients.notes: season the lamb with salt for added flavor

ingredients.name: 1/2 tsp black pepper
ingredients.notes: black pepper enhances the flavors of the other ingredients

instructions: season the lamb with salt and black pepper. set aside.
char-grill the yams over medium-high heat until they're caramelized and slightly charred.
heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. add the onion and cook slowly until it's caramelized and golden brown.
add the garlic to the pot and sauté for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the lamb to the pot and brown it on all sides. remove the lamb from the pot and set it aside.
add the broth, heavy cream, thyme, and rosemary to the pot. stir to combine.
return the lamb to the pot and bring the mixture to a simmer.
cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven. bake for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender and falls off the bone.
remove the pot from the oven and stir in the chopped kaffir lime leaf. season with salt and black pepper to taste.
serve the lamb hot, garnished with additional kaffir lime leaf if desired.
